comments.text:
Two unused variable warnings in test/bedrock/object_storage/chunk_writer_test.exs:

- Line 112: {:ok, writer, status} = ChunkWriter.maybe_flush(writer) - variable 'writer' shadows outer scope
- Line 120: {:ok, writer, status} = ChunkWriter.maybe_flush(writer) - variable 'writer' shadows outer scope

Fix: Prefix with underscore (_writer) since the returned writer is not used in these tests.
comments.author: Jason Allum

title: Fix unused variable warnings in ChunkWriterTest
